entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/awesome-privacy
entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/awesome-privacy#635 · June 19, 2026 23:13
Adds AdGuard Home to ad blockers section #635

Type

Addition

Changes

Adds AdGuardHome to ad blockers section.
Closes #250

Note: This is AdGuard Home (the self-hosted/local DNS server), and NOT …

Addition

Changes

entry.title: lissy93 closed a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:
lissy93 closed lissy93/awesome-privacy#640 · June 20, 2026 07:09
Add BibaVPN to proxies #640

Add BibaVPN to the Proxies section as an open-source self-hosted SOCKS5 and HTTP CONNECT tunnel over TLS and WebSocket for single-VPS deployments.
